tweet.text: RT @spi66: @armdog busted out the Penguin era Army regalia for possibly last pond skate of the year in the burgh. http://t.co/g15l3ruEFL
RT @lascher19: Best fans in the league by far @vaxjolakers unreal atmosphere tonight! Thanks for all the support and the noise The boiis lo…
